response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing real-time credit/liquidity systems — key requirements for a CTO role in this domain.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time data handling
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in tooling and infrastructure
concerns: No demonstrable experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance systems
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear record of building production-grade multi-agent AI systems with feedback loops and observability in high-stakes commercial settings
